report.summary: Day 72 standup v8: Delta since v7 — build-v7 shipped Bitcoin Safe Haven Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, BTC vs gold Iran crisis analysis) + BTC Yield/BTCFi Earning Strategies (~3,400 words, Babylon/Solv/CoreDAO/BounceBit). Design-v7 created 7 OG images, fixed 4 OG metadata refs (dynamic→static SVG), UX-refined Institutional Adoption page (semantic nav, a11y, XP badge). Community-v7 drafted posts #130-131 (F&G crash to 8 — HISTORIC, week-in-review regulation mega-week), 2 SVG cards, newsletter v23 addendum v7, content calendar v34. Publish-v6 promoted governance-security + funding-rate-arbitrage — QUEUE NOW EMPTY. EOD-v7: 5/5 critical pages healthy, 4/5 APIs live, 816 uncommitted files (+9). BTC $70,600. F&G 8-11 (3rd single-digit EVER). Git locks Day 10 — 816 files, ~170+ deploy gap. 41 agent runs today ($3,236). P0 unchanged: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v7: Build-v7 shipped 2 new learn guides: Bitcoin Safe Haven Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 12 min read — BTC vs gold during Iran crisis, ETF flow analysis, US Strategic Reserve impact, portfolio positioning) + BTC Yield & BTCFi Earning Strategies 2026 (~3,400 words, 13 min read — Babylon native staking, Solv/SolvBTC liquid staking, CoreDAO dual-token, BounceBit CeDeFi, risk framework). Both pages scaffolded, SEO-optimized with Article + FAQ schemas.

Design-v7 created 7 branded OG images (btc-yield, bitcoin-safe-haven, onchain-gaming, mpc-wallets, staking-service, btcfi-yield, depin-earning), fixed 4 pages' OG metadata from dynamic /api/og to static SVGs, UX-improved Institutional Adoption (semantic <nav>, a11y, XP badge, TOC consistency).

Community-v7 drafted posts #130-131: F&G crash to 8 (HISTORIC — 3rd single-digit EVER, COVID 2020 +156%, Terra/Luna 2022 +260%), week-in-review regulation mega-week. Updated #125-126 with F&G 8 hook. 2 SVG social cards + newsletter v23 addendum v7 + content calendar v34 (5 posts Wed-Sun).
Publish-v6 promoted governance-security-attack-vectors + funding-rate-arbitrage-guide to PUBLISHED_PAGES. PUBLISH_QUEUE NOW EMPTY. All APIs healthy.
EOD-v7: 5/5 critical pages verified LIVE (200 status). 4/5 API endpoints healthy (market-metrics 404 — exists locally, not deployed). 816 uncommitted files (+9 from v6). TS errors stable at 142.

MARKET (fresh search): BTC $70,602 holding above $70K support. F&G oscillating 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46+, 3rd single-digit reading in index history). Brent crude $114/bbl adding macro pressure. ETF inflows $2.5B March. Resistance at $71.5K-$72K, March high $74K. $13.5B options expiry Thu.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,166 page.tsx files (+2 from v7). 504 unique published slugs (+2 from v7). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 items (empty). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages. 816 uncommitted files. TS errors: 142. Git locks Day 10.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v7: Build-v7 shipped Bitcoin Safe Haven + BTC Yield guides (2 pages, ~6,600 words combined, both clean). Design-v7 created 7 OG images + 4 metadata fixes + Institutional Adoption UX pass. Community-v7 drafted 2 new social posts + updated 2 + 2 SVG cards + newsletter addendum + calendar v34. Publish-v6 promoted 2 pages, emptied queue. EOD-v7 full QA pass — stable.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 items (empty — needs refill). 504 unique published slugs. 1,166 page.tsx files. Today's cumulative output: 14 guides, 18 OG images, 22 social posts, 18 SVG cards, 7 newsletters, 40+ UX fixes, a11y improvements, 4 OG metadata migrations.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock). 816 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx (wallets, taxes, investing, learn fundamentals). 124 learn pages missing dedicated OG images.
STABLE [P1]: TS errors at 142 across 5 files — no regression. MPC Wallets page flagged as client component needing server/client split for SEO.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes. CoinGecko free tier risk — no API key configured.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (521 entries, 504 unique).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×7→8, build×6, design×7, community×7, publish×6, eod×7 = 41 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): 170+ pages trapped. Regulatory clarity content (RWA guide, regulations, governance security) needs indexing NOW — Congress tokenization hearing happened TODAY. F&G crash to 8 makes fear-greed-timeline the highest-value page in our library. Every hour undeployed = lost organic traffic during the most consequential regulatory week in US crypto history. PUBLISH_QUEUE empty = no backlog once locks clear.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH_QUEUE + BUILD TAX PAGES: Queue is empty for first time today. April 15 = 21 days away. Tax season search volume peaks in next 2 weeks — hard deadline. Next build cycle should scaffold crypto-tax-guide, tax-loss-harvesting, and 6 other tax-related slugs with no page.tsx. Also queue new btc-safe-haven and btc-yield guides for promotion.

PRIORITY 3 — OG IMAGE BATCH + MPC WALLETS SEO FIX: 124 learn pages still using dynamic /api/og fallback. Design-v7 proved the pattern (7 images + 4 metadata fixes in one cycle). Batch-generate remaining. MPC Wallets page needs server/client split for metadata export — currently invisible to social crawlers.

STRATEGIC NOTE: F&G at 8 is the single most powerful content hook we've had. Only 2 prior single-digit readings — both preceded massive rallies (+156%, +260%). Our fear-greed-timeline, DCA calculator, and ETF guides are perfectly positioned. Institutional money ($2.5B ETF inflows) diverging from retail panic (F&G 8) at maximum spread. $13.5B options expiry Thu could be the volatility catalyst. Brent crude at $114 adds macro headwind but also strengthens bitcoin-safe-haven narrative. All this content exists — it just needs to be deployed. Agent spend today: $3,236 across 41 runs. Marginal cost: ~$0.
